series_metadata.series_title: Written requests for regulatory interpretations of the hazardous waste laws
series_metadata.series_description: Includes both internal and external written requests for regulatory interpretations of the hazardous waste laws in the form of e-mail, letters and memos. Includes both the original request/question and the Division of Hazardous Waste Management''s response.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain 20 years unless superceded by a new answer, then destroy superceded version when no longer of value., Paper: Recycle
